title: Talkin' 'bout a Revolution
why_this_song: Talkin' 'bout a Revolution by Tracy Chapman (1988) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "They're talking about a revolution?"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Talkin' 'bout a revolution"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Talkin' 'bout a revolution"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Don't you know"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Don't you know"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I've been standing in the welfare lines
Crying at the doorsteps of those armies of salvation

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "revolution" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "revolution" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "talkin'" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "talkin'" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Run, run, run, run, run, run
Wasting time in the unemployment lines

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Talkin' 'bout a Revolution" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Talkin' 'bout a Revolution"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Tracy Chapman one question about "Talkin' 'bout a Revolution", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Tracy Chapman sobre "Talkin' 'bout a Revolution", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Talkin' 'bout a Revolution" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Talkin' 'bout a Revolution" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
